Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x17D3 "MOONSHADOW-0400-17D3" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Moonshadow.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which sets $87, $88 and $89 to $07 to allow the game to run properly. Note: to skip the manual protection step during loading, set a breakpoint on $08DC. When hit, jump to $0CB7 to continue loading the game.
